dashboard.welcomeDescription: This manual contains all the essential information you need as a team member. Browse through the sections below to find policies, procedures, and guidelines for your role. If you have questions, please speak with your supervisor.

safetyReps.title: Your Safety Reps
safetyReps.noHsr: No HSR designated. Contact your admin.

ohsa.noHsrBody: OHSA s.8 requires a designated HSR for workplaces with 6–19 workers. Designate one below.
ohsa.jhscBody: Your workplace now requires a Joint Health and Safety Committee (JHSC), not just an HSR. Contact employment counsel.
ohsa.compliantBody: Your OHSA designations meet current worker-count requirements.

sops.title: Standard Operating Procedures
sops.description: Step-by-step guides for painting tasks and job processes

safety.title: Safety Protocols
safety.description: Guidelines to keep you and your coworkers safe on every job
safety.alertDescription: All employees are expected to follow these safety protocols at all times. Violations may result in disciplinary action up to and including termination.

policies.title: Company Policies
policies.description: Workplace rules and expectations for all team members

training.title: Training Requirements
training.description: Required certifications and ongoing education for team members

disciplinary.title: Disciplinary Procedures
disciplinary.description: Progressive discipline and corrective action policies
disciplinary.alertDescription: Our goal is always to help employees improve. Disciplinary action is a last resort. We encourage open communication with supervisors to address issues before they escalate.
disciplinary.acknowledgment: By continuing employment with the company, you acknowledge that you have read and understand these disciplinary procedures. If you have questions about any policy, please speak with your supervisor or HR.
